metrics.desc: Combinatorial curvature norm N67 = 6^7 √3 from discrete null lattice (Lean OctonionicLightCone)
metrics.name: curvature_norm_combinatorial

metrics.desc: Proton mass anchor formally derived from Lean (DerivedNucleonMass + tuft etc)
metrics.name: derived_proton_mass_MeV

metrics.desc: ADM lapse at canonical reference-like point (Lean HQVMetric / HQVM_lapse)
metrics.name: lapse_factor_ref_point

metrics.desc: Ω_k(N;N) must be exactly 1 at the horizon (Lean theorem omega_k_at_horizon_self)
metrics.name: omega_k_at_horizon_self

metrics.desc: Ω_k at lock-in/reference shell relative to itself (Lean omega_k_lockin_calibration)
metrics.name: omega_k_partial_at_reference

metrics.desc: Lock-in shell index (qcdShell + lattice steps) — changing this is a major formal shift
metrics.name: reference_m

metrics.desc: so(8) Lie closure dimension (Lean SO8Closure + triality + GeneratorsLieClosure)
metrics.name: so8_dim

metrics.desc: GUT coupling from Lean β-running engine (1/42 in paper)
metrics.name: alpha_GUT

metrics.desc: Combinatorial mode count at reference shell (Lean lattice)
metrics.name: available_modes_ref

metrics.desc: Baryon-to-photon ratio η × 10^10 at BBN/CMB from HQIV first-principles (dynamic shell integrator: curvature shells + vev + binding feedback + seed imprint over QCD-to-lock-in window). Paper script hqiv_dynamic_bulk_bbn.py gives ~6.19782 (not 6.10).
metrics.name: bbn_eta10

metrics.desc: CMB birefringence β (deg) at now from HQIV (α imprint + self-clock; paper script 0.379 deg). Python current 0.3 from witness. Agrees with obs within ~0.4σ per paper.
metrics.name: cmb_birefringence_z

metrics.desc: Deuteron total binding B (MeV) from horizon network ladder vs AME2020 (with real exp σ). Large |z| is current uncalibrated gap; Arena dynamic terms target reduction.
metrics.name: deuteron_binding_z

metrics.desc: Tuning exponent for initial curvature to produce observed near-flat universe today. HQIV dynamics from lattice gives natural small Omega_k(now) ~ paper value 0.0098 (agrees with Planck/bounds).
metrics.name: flatness_tuning_exponent

metrics.desc: Free n lifetime (beta decay) from G_F^2 m_e^5 |M|^2 scaffold + ladder (isotope_ladder + hqiv_nuclear_spectra). Matches experiment to ~0.16% in current ladder (benchmark).
metrics.name: free_neutron_half_life

metrics.desc: Hierarchy tuning exponent: HQIV derives weak/Planck (and GUT) scale separation from lock-in m~4 + discrete counts without quadratic tuning. Matches paper derivations of m_p, alpha_GUT.
metrics.name: hierarchy_tuning_exponent

metrics.desc: HQIV predicted Ω_k at the present 'now' slice (dynamic w/ universe age via m_now electron shell). Small positive value must agree roughly with observations (Planck ~0.001, |Ω_k|<~0.02).
metrics.name: omega_k_present_now

metrics.desc: Max | (HQIV derived - exp) / published_1σ | across binding energies, half-lives, masses, BBN η, CMB etc. from the master paper-comparison suite. Core Arena 'sigma everywhere' driver.
metrics.name: paper_comparisons_max_abs_z

metrics.desc: m_p / m_e from HQIV resonance ladder + nucleon binding (tuft + SM_GR_Unification papers)
metrics.name: proton_electron_mass_ratio

metrics.desc: TUFT Hopf κ₆ = η_paper × γ × C₂ (C2 = lapse conc at lock-in) for advanced mass/binding corrections in papers. Python now mirrors Lean.
metrics.name: tuft_hopf_kappa6_correction

metrics.desc: Vacuum energy density from finite sum ½ N(m) ω(m) over causal modes 0 to m_now (matches paper kirchhoff_finite_mode script). HQIV gives observed small value naturally.
metrics.name: vacuum_energy_discrepancy
